query:
DELETE FROM casbin_rule WHERE
                    ptype = ?1 AND
                    (v1 is NULL OR v1 = COALESCE(?2,v1)) AND
                    (v2 is NULL OR v2 = COALESCE(?3,v2)) AND
                    (v3 is NULL OR v3 = COALESCE(?4,v3)) AND
                    (v4 is NULL OR v4 = COALESCE(?5,v4)) AND
                    (v5 is NULL OR v5 = COALESCE(?6,v5))
